title: Asaita Heat Wave
lead: Asaita is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Asaita is extremely high, resulting in a critical heat wave alert. 
 The heat wave is causing significant discomfort, with a relative humidity of 52% and wind speed of 0.6 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 9.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
